subject: Dartrix — owl-like creature with a white mask-like face marking, green body, and wing feathers. Perched in a dark forest at night.
description: An owl-like creature perches on a branch in a darkened forest setting. The creature has a prominent white mask-like face with dark eyes, a rounded green and brown body, and layered wing feathers. Its posture is upright and alert. The background shows dark coniferous trees and a dim, twilight-blue atmosphere. The scene is moody and quiet.
foreground: owl-like creature perched on branch, white mask face, green body
background: dark forest, twilight blue, coniferous trees
